sizing_rule.note: Ralph Vince optimal f method. Position size divisor = f_value (0.01) × $50,000,000. Calculate HPR for each scenario using (1 + scenario_result/divisor)^probability, then aggregate. Worst-case loss determines the denominator for loss ratio calculation.

source_rule_text: Position size is determined by dividing the worst-case loss scenario by the f value multiplied by 50,000,000 to calculate the HPR (Holding Period Return) across all probability scenarios.
